title: Volume of a rectangular prism
problem: Find the volume of a rectangular prism with length $9$ cm, width $4$ cm and height $3$ cm.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for the volume of a rectangular prism.
Substitute the length, width and height into the formula.

title: Volume of a triangular prism
problem: A triangular prism has a triangular cross-section with base $8$ cm and perpendicular height $5$ cm. The length of the prism is $12$ cm. Find the volume.

steps.instruction: Find the area of the triangular cross-section using $A = \frac{1}{2} \times b \times h$.
Multiply the cross-sectional area by the length of the prism.

title: Finding a missing dimension
problem: A rectangular prism has a volume of $144$ cm³, a length of $9$ cm and a width of $4$ cm. Find the height.

steps.instruction: Write the formula for the volume of a rectangular prism.
Substitute the known values into the formula.
Solve for $h$ by dividing both sides by $36$.
